rationale: The selected candidate (fef02f) is technically accurate and maintains the playful tone of the original. It correctly uses French typographic conventions (non-breaking spaces before colons). The high-priority suggestion from the previous judge report ('Qu'affichera' vs 'Que affichera') is already present in the provided MDX content for this commit, so no further suggestions are needed.

suggestionLog.reason: Grammar: 'Que' should be elided to 'Qu'' before a vowel.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.
